title: Epic rugby showdown in George: DHL Stormers vs Hollywoodbets Sharks
description: GEORGE NEWS - Get ready for a night of...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Get ready for a night of rugby as the DHL Stormers face off against the Hollywoodbets Sharks in a friendly match at Outeniqua Park Stadium in George! This is your chance to witness two of South Africa’s rugby powerhouses battle it out in an unforgettable showdown.


> The match takes place next Friday 12 September at 18:00 and gates open at 12:30 at the Outeniqua Park Stadium in George.


Tickets cost R100, but the first 1 000 tickets are sold for R80 per person with free entry for children under three.

Tickets went on sale on 2 September and are available at the following locations: Outeniqua Park, Top Gear Sport, Pick n Pay (Pacaltsdorp and Knysna Road), Grootbrak Spar and Buddy’s Liquor Store in George.Parking and regulationsParking cost R20 at Heatherlands High School grounds and attendees are requested not to park on sidewalks or driveways.


> The following actions and items are prohibited inside the stadium: smoking, hookah pipes, alcohol, drugs, firearms and animals.


Bring your energy, pack the stands, and create an electric atmosphere at Outeniqua Park. Whether you’re cheering for the Stormers or the Sharks, this is set to be an epic battle you won’t want to miss!

Grab your tickets early and enjoy an unforgettable evening of rugby action.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
